name: The Great Gift Exchange!
overview: A charitable gift giving spectacular wherein 12 creators are magically transported to a whimsical Wrapshop to learn the art of gift wrapping from the World’s Most Famous Gift Wrap Artist. It’s an important year for giving back so break out the scissors, tape, ribbons, and bows - it’s time to get wrapping!

trailers.title: The Great Gift Exchange is Coming!
